headline: Philippine Airlines Expands Partnership with TA Connections to Enhance Disrupted Passenger Support Across North America
summary: ATLANTA, May 05, 2026--TA Connections, a Corpay (NYSE: CPAY) company and global leader in crew logistics and passenger disruption management, today announced the expansion of its long-standing partnership with Philippine Airlines, the flag carrier of the Philippines.

headline: Paypal (PYPL) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Paypal (PYPL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +5.85% and +2.96%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
